revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q13101602)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 4 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
